en.extract:
The Buru bush warbler (Locustella disturbans) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island Buru in Indonesia where it is found on the forest floor.


References

International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.

The '''Buru bush warbler''' ('''''Locustella disturbans''''') is a [[species]] of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Locustellidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the island [[Buru Island|Buru]] in [[Indonesia]] where it is found on the [[forest floor]].
